case_title: BENNETT DONALD K. VS JOSEPH KAPLAN INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENNETT DONALD K. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JOSEPH KAPLAN INC. JUDGMENT IS SET ASIDE & CASE IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE IN ORDER TO PROCEED IN THE PROPER VENUE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
